title: Photo Gallery Website with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase
description: Build a photo gallery website with Pinterest-style layout, album management, and admin panel using Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase.

verification.summary: All features implemented successfully. npm run build compiles without errors. All routes registered correctly (static and dynamic). No test framework specified so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present so docker_build is skipped.
